description: Zero-dependency security regex patterns for hybrid security scanning. Provides ~35% vulnerability coverage without external tools.

patterns.name: AWS Access Key ID
patterns.description: Hardcoded AWS access key ID. These keys grant programmatic access to AWS services.

patterns.name: AWS Secret Access Key
patterns.description: Hardcoded AWS secret access key.

patterns.name: RSA/DSA/EC Private Key
patterns.description: Private key material embedded in source code.

patterns.name: Generic Database Connection String
patterns.description: Database connection string with embedded credentials.

patterns.name: Generic API Key Assignment
patterns.description: Hardcoded API key assigned to a variable.

patterns.name: GitHub Personal Access Token
patterns.description: GitHub personal access token. Will be auto-revoked if pushed to public repos.

patterns.name: Slack Bot/Webhook Token
patterns.description: Slack API token (bot, user, or webhook).

patterns.name: Stripe Secret Key
patterns.description: Stripe secret or restricted key. Live keys grant access to financial operations.

patterns.name: Twilio API Key
patterns.description: Twilio API key SID.

patterns.name: SendGrid API Key
patterns.description: SendGrid API key.

patterns.name: Google API Key
patterns.description: Google API key.

patterns.name: Heroku API Key
patterns.description: Heroku API key in UUID format.

patterns.name: JWT Secret Assignment
patterns.description: Hardcoded JWT signing secret. Enables token forgery.

patterns.name: Password Assignment
patterns.description: Hardcoded password literal. May be a false positive in test files.

patterns.name: OpenAI API Key
patterns.description: OpenAI API key.

patterns.name: Azure Storage Account Key
patterns.description: Azure Storage account key (base64, 88 characters).

patterns.name: Supabase Service Role Key
patterns.description: Supabase JWT token (service role key bypasses RLS).

patterns.name: Discord Bot Token
patterns.description: Discord bot or user token.

patterns.name: SQL Injection via Python f-string
patterns.description: SQL query constructed with f-string interpolation. Use parameterized queries.

patterns.name: SQL Injection via String Concatenation
patterns.description: SQL query built by concatenating user input.

patterns.name: SQL Injection via Template Literal
patterns.description: SQL query with template literal interpolation of request data.

patterns.name: SQL Injection via Python format()
patterns.description: SQL query built with .format() string interpolation.

patterns.name: SQL Injection via percent formatting
patterns.description: SQL query with % string formatting. Use parameterized placeholders via the second argument to execute().

patterns.name: Command Injection via shell=True
patterns.description: subprocess with shell=True. Vulnerable if command string includes user input.

patterns.name: Command Injection via os.system
patterns.description: os.system/popen with dynamic command string. Use subprocess with argument list.

patterns.name: Command Injection via child_process exec
patterns.description: child_process exec with interpolated user input. Use execFile with argument array.

patterns.name: XSS via innerHTML
patterns.description: Assignment to innerHTML with dynamic content. Use textContent or sanitize with DOMPurify.

patterns.name: XSS via dangerouslySetInnerHTML
patterns.description: React dangerouslySetInnerHTML usage. Ensure content is sanitized.

patterns.name: XSS via document.write
patterns.description: document.write can inject unsanitized content into DOM.

patterns.name: XSS via jQuery html()
patterns.description: jQuery .html() with dynamic content. Use .text() or sanitize.

patterns.name: XSS via v-html directive
patterns.description: Vue v-html renders raw HTML. Ensure content is sanitized.

patterns.name: XSS via bypassSecurityTrust
patterns.description: Angular DomSanitizer bypass. Validate input before bypassing security.

patterns.name: eval() Usage
patterns.description: eval() executes arbitrary code. Use safer alternatives like JSON.parse().

patterns.name: Python exec/compile
patterns.description: exec()/compile() with dynamic code. Dangerous if input is user-controlled.

patterns.name: Python pickle deserialization
patterns.description: pickle deserialization can execute arbitrary code. Use json or msgpack for untrusted data.

patterns.name: Python yaml.load (unsafe)
patterns.description: yaml.load without SafeLoader allows arbitrary code execution. Use yaml.safe_load().

patterns.name: PHP unserialize
patterns.description: PHP unserialize with user input enables object injection attacks.

patterns.name: Java deserialization
patterns.description: Java deserialization of untrusted data. Use allowlisting or alternative formats.

patterns.name: new Function() constructor
patterns.description: Function constructor is equivalent to eval(). Avoid dynamic code generation.

patterns.name: Weak Hash: MD5
patterns.description: MD5 is cryptographically broken. Use SHA-256 or better for security-sensitive hashing.

patterns.name: Weak Hash: SHA1
patterns.description: SHA-1 has known collision attacks. Use SHA-256 or SHA-3.

patterns.name: ECB Mode Usage
patterns.description: ECB mode does not provide semantic security. Use GCM or CBC with HMAC.

patterns.name: Hardcoded IV/Nonce
patterns.description: Hardcoded initialization vector or nonce. Use cryptographically random values.

patterns.name: Math.random for security
patterns.description: Math.random() is not cryptographically secure. Use crypto.getRandomValues() or crypto.randomBytes().

patterns.name: TLS Verification Disabled (Python)
patterns.description: SSL/TLS certificate verification disabled. Enables MITM attacks.

patterns.name: TLS Verification Disabled (Node)
patterns.description: Node.js TLS certificate verification disabled.

patterns.name: TLS Verification Disabled (Go)
patterns.description: Go TLS InsecureSkipVerify set to true.

patterns.name: Django DEBUG=True
patterns.description: Django DEBUG mode enabled. Leaks stack traces and settings in production.

patterns.name: Flask Debug Mode
patterns.description: Flask running with debug=True enables the interactive debugger in production.

patterns.name: Express Detailed Errors
patterns.description: Detailed error stack traces exposed to client.

patterns.name: Path Traversal
patterns.description: File system operation with user-controlled path. Validate and sanitize path input.

patterns.name: Python Path Traversal
patterns.description: File open with user-controlled path. Use os.path.realpath and validate against a base directory.

patterns.name: SSRF via fetch/axios/requests
patterns.description: HTTP request with user-controlled URL. Validate against allowlist.

patterns.name: Plaintext Password Comparison
patterns.description: Plaintext password comparison. Use bcrypt.compare() or argon2.verify().

patterns.name: JWT None Algorithm
patterns.description: JWT with 'none' algorithm allows unsigned tokens.

patterns.name: Wildcard CORS
patterns.description: Wildcard CORS allows any origin to make credentialed requests.

patterns.name: CORS Origin Reflection
patterns.description: CORS origin reflected from request without validation. Allows any origin.

patterns.name: Open Redirect
patterns.description: Redirect to user-controlled URL. Validate against allowlist of domains.

patterns.name: Missing Security Headers
patterns.description: Search for security header configuration. Absence is a finding.
patterns.note: This is an inverse pattern: absence of matches indicates the issue.

patterns.name: Sensitive Data in Logs
patterns.description: Potentially sensitive data written to logs.

patterns.name: TOCTOU File Race Condition
patterns.description: Time-of-check to time-of-use race condition on file operations.

patterns.name: Server-Side Template Injection
patterns.description: Template rendered from user input. Enables server-side template injection.

patterns.name: Hardcoded IP Address
patterns.description: Hardcoded private IP address. Use configuration or service discovery.

patterns.name: NoSQL Injection
patterns.description: MongoDB query with unsanitized user input. Validate and sanitize query operators.
